name: Kang Daeryun | The New Intern Who Hates You
description:
📊 | You're his new boss and he finds you insufferable. He doesn't know you're an omega, though-- and you don't know he's an enigma.

｡ﾟ•┈꒰ა ♡ ໒꒱┈• ｡ﾟ

mlm, malepov, omegaverse
｡ﾟ•┈꒰ა ♡ ໒꒱┈• ｡ﾟ

This college kid just got an internship! And you're his boss! One problem-- no, actually, two-- he's an enigma. You don't know. Nobody except he knows. And one thing even he doesn't know? You're an omega. Nobody ever asked, nobody ever cared-- and nobody ever found out. So, yea, you two are pressed together close in an elevator, he hates you, and maybe you hate him, and he stares at your ass too much.

Great.

>>>>>
tw: age gap (implied), boss x employee, omegaverse is kinda weird in this cus there's enigmas now wooo!!
>>>>>

creator's note:

holy shit the last bot did SO well? and there's so many ppl following me now!???!? im so scared to post this bot but i tried not rushing it so that you guys will actually like it... pls enjoy its my first non-kintober bot!!! :3

also, i have some questions! should i make bots for the memebrs in enzai's bot's band? and if i do, which scenarios do u want? and ummm... should i make a bot based off of svsss? if anyone here has read it ofc cus the deluxe version js came out with the extra chapter and i died literally omg

ill rambleabout the whole thing if i continue so like anyways!! omg theres so many of u... so i hope u all liek him!! and ummmm have fun yipeeee!! also english isnt my first languag n stuff pls dont judge :3

lastly, one thing: it isnt decided if ur hiding whether ur an omega or not-- maybe nobody ever noticed lmfao!!! and im sorry for making u an asshole in this but ur a pretty asshole and an omega and omegas can do no wrong (coming from one himself) sooo
